query:
SELECT 
  c.ghlContactId,
  HOUR(CONVERT_TZ(c.callTimestamp, '+00:00', '-06:00')) as call_hour,
  c.callDirection,
  c.callTimestamp
FROM calls c
WHERE c.callDirection = 'outbound'
  AND c.ghlContactId IS NOT NULL
  AND DATE(CONVERT_TZ(c.callTimestamp, '+00:00', '-06:00')) = DATE(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(), '+00:00', '-06:00'))
ORDER BY c.callTimestamp DESC
LIMIT 30;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bTLYzeacnuAd6z.root --database nusXfQu5XBTMz3NUCR6brb --execute SELECT 
  c.ghlContactId,
  HOUR(CONVERT_TZ(c.callTimestamp, '+00:00', '-06:00')) as call_hour,
  c.callDirection,
  c.callTimestamp
FROM calls c
WHERE c.callDirection = 'outbound'
  AND c.ghlContactId IS NOT NULL
  AND DATE(CONVERT_TZ(c.callTimestamp, '+00:00', '-06:00')) = DATE(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(), '+00:00', '-06:00'))
ORDER BY c.callTimestamp DESC
LIMIT 30;
